holdings.infoBox: SLYV is an equity ETF with a total of 462 individual holdings. The top holdings are Molina Healthcare stock at 1.17%, Eastman Chemical Company at 0.96%, Match Group at 0.95%, Vishay Intertechnology at 0.88%, and Jackson Financial at 0.87%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P 600 Small Cap Value ETF (SLYV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Small Cap 600 Value index, a market-cap-weighted index of US small cap value stocks. SLYV was launched on Sep 25, 2000 and is issued by State Street.

data.title: How To Avoid The Worst Style ETFs 1Q22
data.text: The large number of ETFs has little to do with serving investors' best interests. Here are three red flags investors can use to avoid the worst ETFs.
